headline: BlackRock (BLK) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: BlackRock (BLK) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +9.34% and +1.48%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
